mandatory_fields.suggested_fix: Provide the importer's Tax ID (NPWP) on the commercial invoice.
Provide the importer's name on the commercial invoice.
Specify the invoice currency (e.g. USD, IDR).

mandatory_fields.message: Packing List total gross weight is missing.
mandatory_fields.suggested_fix: Provide the total gross weight on the packing list.

mandatory_fields.message: Bill of Lading total gross weight is missing.
mandatory_fields.suggested_fix: Provide the total gross weight on the bill of lading.

hs_code_restrictions.message: Import Permit PI_Besi_Baja required for HS 72.
hs_code_restrictions.suggested_fix: Attach PI_Besi_Baja document or update HS code.

hs_code_restrictions.message: Surveyor Report LS_Tekstil required for HS 61.
hs_code_restrictions.suggested_fix: Attach LS_Tekstil surveyor report or update HS code.

hs_code_restrictions.message: Import Permit PI_Kendaraan required for HS 87.
hs_code_restrictions.suggested_fix: Attach PI_Kendaraan import permit or update HS code.
